title: EU leaders need private investment in renewables, but policies don’t match up [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe faces a major fossil-fuel crisis but has solutions: renewables, grids, storage and electrification, which require private capital. Yet upcoming environmental rules may disincentivise businesses to sign renewable energy contracts. Europe must align energy and environmental policy.
